## Checklist

<!-- All items must be checked before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] My PR targets the `dev` branch, not `main`
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm build` completes successfully
- [ ] TypeScript types are correct (`pnpm typecheck` passes)
- [ ] I followed the component conventions (cva variants, forwardRef, displayName)
- [ ] I did not edit `tokens.css` directly (token changes go in the JSON source files)
- [ ] All named exports are used (no default exports added)
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant documentation if needed
